posts.author: NadineP (Nadine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

One board sat in more than one workspace, or a feature to be able to add a shortcut to a board into a different workspace) sitting alongside other projects/boards

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to access a board from multiple locations. We have workspaces for different teams, and it would be able to have crossfunctional projects sat in multiple workspaces (or links to), to enable ease of access. Similar to having a shortcut to a document in a folder, when the original sits in a different folder in google folders, or microsoft.
